title: Caregiver - Guide Caregiver to Add PwD Before Inquiry (30 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-408: System guides caregiver to add a PwD profile before making a vendor inquiry. Validates 'Add PwD Profile' CTA navigates to PwD registration flow, after successful PwD creation user returns to product page with newly added PwD auto-selected and Contact Vendor enabled, helper text explains PwD requirement. Edge cases: abandoned PwD creation, PwD limit reached, network failure retry.

testCases.title: Caregiver can navigate to product detail page from catalog
steps: Verify URL contains /product/ or page has product content.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Caregiver navigates to a product detail page.

testCases.title: Product detail page has product heading
steps: Verify H1 heading is visible with non-empty text.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Product detail page displays a product heading.

testCases.title: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA visible on product detail page
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA is visible or page contains 'Add PwD' text.

testCases.title: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA is a clickable element
steps: Verify it is a button or link.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA is a clickable element.

testCases.title: Clicking 'Add PwD Profile' navigates to PwD registration flow
steps: Verify URL changes or registration form/modal appears.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page with 'Add PwD Profile' CTA visible.
expectedResults: Caregiver is navigated to PwD registration flow.

testCases.title: PwD registration flow URL or modal is correct
steps: Verify URL contains registration path or modal/form is displayed.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver clicked 'Add PwD Profile'.
expectedResults: PwD registration flow is correctly loaded.

testCases.title: PwD registration page has form fields
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on PwD registration flow.
expectedResults: PwD registration form has input fields.

testCases.title: PwD registration page has submit/save button
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on PwD registration flow.
expectedResults: PwD registration form has a submit/save action.

testCases.title: After PwD creation user returns to product page
testCases.feature: Return to Product After PwD Creation
steps: Verify URL returns to /product/ or product content visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver completed PwD registration.
expectedResults: User is returned to product page after PwD creation.

testCases.title: Product page content intact after return from PwD creation
testCases.feature: Return to Product After PwD Creation
steps: After returning from PwD creation, verify H1 heading visible.
Verify page body contains product content.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver returned to product page after PwD creation.
expectedResults: Product page content is intact after return.

testCases.title: Newly added PwD is auto-selected or selectable after creation
steps: After PwD creation and return, check PwD selection element.
Verify newly added PwD is auto-selected or available.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver returned to product page after PwD creation.
expectedResults: Newly added PwD is auto-selected or selectable.

testCases.title: PwD dropdown shows updated list after new PwD creation
steps: After PwD creation, locate PwD dropdown/trigger.
Verify list includes newly created PwD.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver returned to product page after PwD creation.
expectedResults: PwD dropdown reflects newly created PwD.

testCases.title: Contact Vendor button enabled after PwD creation
testCases.feature: Contact Vendor Enabled After PwD Creation
steps: After PwD creation and return, verify Contact Vendor button is enabled.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver returned with newly created PwD selected.
expectedResults: Contact Vendor button is enabled after PwD creation.

testCases.title: Contact Vendor button is clickable after PwD creation
testCases.feature: Contact Vendor Enabled After PwD Creation
steps: After PwD creation, click Contact Vendor.
testCases.preconditions: Contact Vendor is enabled after PwD creation.
expectedResults: Contact Vendor button is functional after PwD creation.

testCases.title: Helper text visible on product detail page
steps: Scroll to Contact Vendor / PwD area.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Helper text is visible near PwD selection / Contact Vendor area.

testCases.title: Helper text contains PwD/required keywords
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Helper text references PwD selection requirement.

testCases.title: Helper text explains why PwD selection is needed
steps: Verify body contains explanatory text about PwD for vendor contact.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Helper text explains purpose of PwD selection.

testCases.title: Helper text visible before any PwD is selected
steps: Navigate to product detail without selecting PwD.
Verify helper text or guidance is visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on product detail page, no PwD selected.
expectedResults: Helper text is shown before PwD selection.

testCases.title: Helper text disappears or changes after PwD is selected
steps: Note helper text state before PwD selection.
Verify helper text changes or disappears.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Helper text state updates after PwD selection.

testCases.title: Abandoning PwD creation returns to product page with no PwD selected
steps: Verify URL returns to /product/ or product content visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver clicked 'Add PwD Profile' and is on registration flow.
expectedResults: Caregiver returns to product page with no PwD selected.

testCases.title: Contact Vendor remains disabled after abandoned PwD creation
steps: After abandoning PwD creation, verify Contact Vendor button state.
Verify it is disabled or blocked.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver abandoned PwD creation and returned to product page.
expectedResults: Contact Vendor remains disabled after abandoned PwD creation.

testCases.title: Clear message shown when PwD limit is reached
steps: Check for message indicating PwD limit reached.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver has reached maximum PwD profiles.
expectedResults: Clear message shown when PwD limit is reached.

testCases.title: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA disabled when PwD limit reached
steps: Verify it is disabled or not clickable.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver has reached maximum PwD profiles.
expectedResults: 'Add PwD Profile' CTA is disabled.

testCases.title: Retry option provided on network failure during PwD creation
steps: Verify retry option or error message displayed.
testCases.preconditions: Network failure occurs during PwD creation.
expectedResults: Retry option or error message provided on network failure.

testCases.title: Error message on network failure is user-friendly
steps: Observe error message on network failure.
testCases.preconditions: Network failure occurred during PwD creation.
expectedResults: Error message is clear and user-friendly.

testCases.title: Mobile viewport renders Add PwD flow correctly
steps: Verify Add PwD / PwD content visible.
testCases.preconditions: Browser viewport set to mobile.
expectedResults: Add PwD flow renders correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Multiple products have consistent Add PwD CTA behavior
steps: Click first View details, verify Add PwD / PwD content.
Click second View details, verify same content.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on catalog page.
expectedResults: Add PwD CTA behavior is consistent across products.

testCases.title: Page refresh retains Add PwD CTA state
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Page refresh does not break Add PwD CTA.

testCases.title: Back navigation from PwD registration returns to product page
steps: Verify URL returns to /product/ or product content visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver clicked 'Add PwD Profile' and is on registration flow.
expectedResults: Browser back returns to product page.

testCases.title: Add PwD CTA styling is distinct and discoverable
steps: Scroll to PwD / Contact Vendor area.
Verify page contains 'Add PwD' or 'add' and 'profile' text.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on a product detail page.
expectedResults: Add PwD CTA is discoverable on the page.
